name: Travel advice main flow
description: Test the core Relo flow: user enters a travel/relocation scenario and receives organized AI-generated advice in tabs

planSteps.description: Verify the page title 'Relo' and subtitle are visible
Type a travel scenario into the textarea, for example: 'I am Egyptian moving to Germany as a student with a 1000 euro budget'
Click the submit button labeled 'احصل على خطتك'
Wait for the loading state to finish and verify a result section appears with tabs
Click through each tab and verify each shows non-empty content
Verify no error message is displayed after a successful submission
Submit the form with an empty textarea
Verify a validation error message appears
